<!-- ============================================================================
ACCESSIBILITY STANDARDS - WCAG 2.1
============================================================================ -->

ALL UI changes MUST comply with WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

**Contrast Requirements:**
- Normal text (< 18pt or < 14pt bold): **minimum 4.5:1** contrast ratio
- Large text (≥ 18pt or ≥ 14pt bold): **minimum 3:1** contrast ratio
- UI components and graphical objects: **minimum 3:1** contrast ratio
- Enhanced (AAA): 7:1 for normal text, 4.5:1 for large text

**Before committing any UI changes:**
1. Check contrast ratios for all text/background combinations
2. Check contrast ratios for icons on colored backgrounds
3. Verify focus indicators are visible (3:1 minimum)
4. Test interactive elements have discernible states

**Tools:** Use WebAIM Contrast Checker: https://webaim.org/resources/contrastchecker/
